rationale: The cited paper appears only as a brief example in the Future Research section, where the authors suggest that later work could test other FCE-reduction strategies such as preference articulation. It is not used to build the core theory, hypotheses, or study design in this paper, which instead relies mainly on Wegner's suppression framework and FCE literature. Because the citation serves as a peripheral illustrative pointer rather than a meaningful input to the present contribution, the role is mention-only.
